# seerr_api_key (Data Source)

Read the Seerr API key via /api/v1/settings/main.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_api_key" "current" {}

output "seerr_api_key" {
  value     = data.seerr_api_key.current.api_key
  sensitive = true
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The current Seerr API key.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
